car_offer_token.title: Car Offer Token
car_offer_token.description: Expedia car offer token used for continuation flows.

offer_heading.title: Offer Heading
offer_heading.description: Primary title shown for the car offer.

reserve_button_text.title: Reserve Button Text
reserve_button_text.description: Reserve CTA label from listing card.

accessibility_string.title: Accessibility String
accessibility_string.description: Accessibility summary text for the card.

infosite_url.title: Infosite URL
infosite_url.description: Expedia detail page URL for this offer.

vehicle_attributes.title: Vehicle Attributes
vehicle_attributes.description: Vehicle attribute labels such as transmission and seats.

review_label.title: Review Label
review_label.description: Text label such as Wonderful or Very Good.

price_lead.title: Lead Price
price_lead.description: Lead price text for the offer.

price_total.title: Total Price
price_total.description: Total price text for the offer.

strike_through_first.title: Strike Through First
strike_through_first.description: Indicates if strike-through price is shown before primary price.

multi_item_price_token.title: Multi Item Price Token
multi_item_price_token.description: Token used by Expedia multi-item pricing flow.

fare_comparison_enabled.title: Fare Comparison Enabled
fare_comparison_enabled.description: Flag indicating fare comparison mode on the card.

price_summary_text.title: Price Summary Text
price_summary_text.description: Price summary text returned for the offer.

selected_accessories.title: Selected Accessories
selected_accessories.description: Selected accessories attached to the offer token.

reward_points_selection.title: Reward Points Selection
reward_points_selection.description: Rewards mode associated with the offer.

continuation_contextual_id.title: Continuation Contextual ID
continuation_contextual_id.description: Context ID used for follow-up API requests.

search_id.title: Search ID
search_id.description: Expedia search identifier for this batch.

pick_up_region.title: Pickup Region
pick_up_region.description: Pickup region ID used in request.

drop_off_region.title: Drop-off Region
drop_off_region.description: Drop-off region ID used in request.

pick_up_time.title: Pickup Time
pick_up_time.description: Pickup time string used in request.

drop_off_time.title: Drop-off Time
drop_off_time.description: Drop-off time string used in request.

operation_name.title: Operation Name
operation_name.description: GraphQL operation name used by actor.

scraped_at.title: Scraped At
scraped_at.description: ISO timestamp when record was captured.
